requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety & Thermal Runaway Propagation — BESS (Estonia / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统消防安全与热失控扩散（爱沙尼亚／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統消防安全與熱失控擴散（愛沙尼亞／歐盟）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 sets safety requirements for grid-connected energy storage systems, including evaluation of thermal runaway propagation at cell, module and system level. Ed 2.0 remains in development and does not supersede the 2020 edition for this dataset. Installations must demonstrate that thermal runaway in one cell does not propagate uncontrolled to adjacent cells/modules. Many EU member-state building codes and installers additionally require UL 9540A fire-test data to quantify heat release and propagation risk for fire-compartment design. EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the harmonised European adoption (harmonised status under OJ review as of 2026-06-11). Estonia's building permit process is administered through local municipalities and the Technical Regulatory Authority (Tehnilise Järelevalve Amet, TJA); large battery installations typically require an EPC contractor and building permit consistent with the Estonian Building Code (Ehitusseadustik). Cold climate conditions in Estonia (ambient temperatures down to −30 °C) mean thermal management systems must demonstrate safe behaviour across the full operating temperature range, including low-temperature operation and freeze-prevention measures.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020为并网储能系统规定了安全要求，包括在电芯、模组和系统层级对热失控扩散进行评估。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本数据集中不视为取代2020年版。安装项目须证明单一电芯热失控不会不受控地蔓延至相邻电芯或模组。欧盟多个成员国的建筑规范及安装商亦额外要求提供UL 9540A火灾试验数据，用于量化释热量与扩散风险，以便进行防火分区设计。EN IEC 62933-5-2为该标准的欧洲协调版本（截至2026-06-11，协调标准官方公报登录状态在审）。爱沙尼亚的建筑许可流程由地方市政当局及技术监管局（TJA）管理；大型储能装置通常需要符合爱沙尼亚《建筑法典》（Ehitusseadustik）的EPC承包商和建筑许可。爱沙尼亚的严寒气候条件（环境温度可低至-30°C）意味着热管理系统必须证明在全工况温度范围内（包括低温运行和防冻措施）的安全性。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020為並網儲能系統規定安全要求，包括在電芯、模組及系統層級對熱失控擴散進行評估。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本數據集中不視為取代2020年版。安裝項目須證明單一電芯熱失控不會不受控地蔓延至相鄰電芯或模組。歐盟多個成員國的建築規範及安裝商亦額外要求提供UL 9540A火災試驗數據，用以量化釋熱量與擴散風險，以便進行防火分區設計。EN IEC 62933-5-2為該標準的歐洲協調版本（截至2026-06-11，協調標準官方公報登錄狀態在審）。愛沙尼亞的建築許可流程由地方市政當局及技術監管局（TJA）管理；大型儲能裝置通常需要符合愛沙尼亞《建築法典》（Ehitusseadustik）的EPC承包商和建築許可。愛沙尼亞的嚴寒氣候條件（環境溫度可低至-30°C）意味著熱管理系統必須證明在全工況溫度範圍內（包括低溫運行和防凍措施）的安全性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 — Electrical energy storage (EES) systems – Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems
EN IEC 62933-5-2 (harmonised EU adoption — harmonised status under review as of 2026-06-11 due to Malamud ruling)
ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A:2025 (5th Edition, published March 12, 2025) — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems
Ehitusseadustik (Estonian Building Code) — national building permit and installation authority framework

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (revised, released 6 August 2023 by SAC/SAMR, in force from 1 March 2024, superseding GB/T 36276-2018) covers lithium-ion battery packs and systems for stationary energy storage, including thermal-runaway tests at cell and module level. The 2023 revision tightened test conditions (e.g. external short-circuit resistance reduced from 5 mΩ to 1 mΩ) and expanded abuse-test coverage. However, the propagation-prevention test methodology and pass/fail thresholds differ from IEC 62933-5-2. GB/T 36276 does not adopt UL 9540A protocols, and system-level fire-compartment propagation data generated under Chinese test conditions is generally not in the format required by EU installers or AHJs.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（修订版，国家标准化管理委员会/国家市场监督管理总局于2023年8月6日发布，2024年3月1日起实施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵盖固定式储能用锂离子电池包及系统，包含电芯和模组层级的热失控试验。2023年修订版收紧了试验条件（如外部短路电阻由5 mΩ降至1 mΩ）并扩展了滥用测试范围。然而，其扩散防止试验方法与合格判定准则与IEC 62933-5-2存在差异。GB/T 36276未采用UL 9540A测试规程，依中国试验条件生成的系统级防火分区扩散数据，通常无法满足欧盟安装商或主管当局所要求的格式。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（修訂版，國家標準化管理委員會/國家市場監督管理總局於2023年8月6日發布，2024年3月1日起實施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵蓋固定式儲能用鋰離子電池包及系統，包含電芯和模組層級的熱失控試驗。2023年修訂版收緊了試驗條件（如外部短路電阻由5 mΩ降至1 mΩ）並擴展了濫用測試範圍。然而，其擴散防止試驗方法與合格判定準則與IEC 62933-5-2存在差異。GB/T 36276未採用UL 9540A測試規程，依中國試驗條件生成的系統級防火分區擴散數據，通常無法滿足歐盟安裝商或主管當局所要求的格式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion battery packs and systems for electric energy storage (released 6 August 2023, in force 1 March 2024, supersedes GB/T 36276-2018; recommended national standard)
GB/T 51048-2025 — Standard for Design of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station (supersedes GB 51048-2014; issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026)

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese test reports under GB/T 36276 typically do not include the system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data required by IEC 62933-5-2 Annex C, nor UL 9540A heat-release-rate (HRR) and fire-spread data needed for EU building/fire-compartment approvals. EU installers and AHJs increasingly request UL 9540A-format data even where not legally mandated. Additionally for Estonia: cold-climate thermal management documentation (down to −30 °C operating range) is required — Chinese test reports generated at standard ambient conditions (typically 25 °C) do not demonstrate low-temperature safety performance. Estonian building permit submissions (TJA) will require Estonian or English-language fire-safety documentation; Chinese-only documentation is not accepted.
gap.zh: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中国测试报告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附录C所要求的系统级热失控扩散试验数据，亦不含欧盟建筑及防火分区审批所需的UL 9540A热释放速率（HRR）与火势蔓延数据。此外，针对爱沙尼亚：需要提供低温热管理文件（运行温度低至-30°C）——在标准环境条件（通常25°C）下生成的中国测试报告无法证明低温安全性能。爱沙尼亚建筑许可申请（TJA）将要求爱沙尼亚语或英语消防安全文件，纯中文文件不被接受。
gap.zht: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中國測試報告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附錄C所要求的系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據，亦不含歐盟建築及防火分區審批所需的UL 9540A熱釋放速率（HRR）與火勢蔓延數據。此外，針對愛沙尼亞：需要提供低溫熱管理文件（運行溫度低至-30°C）——在標準環境條件（通常25°C）下生成的中國測試報告無法證明低溫安全性能。愛沙尼亞建築許可申請（TJA）將要求愛沙尼亞語或英語消防安全文件，純中文文件不被接受。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62933-5-2 is referenced in EU member-state grid-connection and building regulations with varying legal force. EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the European adoption; harmonised status under LVD not yet confirmed by OJ citation as of mid-2026 due to Malamud copyright dispute. UL 9540A is not mandated by EU law but is functionally required by many AHJs and insurers. In Estonia, the Technical Regulatory Authority (TJA) oversees building-permit and safety compliance for BESS installations; cold-climate performance documentation is a practical requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard in China. GB/T 51048-2025 (issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026) is classified as a recommended (推荐性) national standard — a change from the mandatory (强制性) designation of the 2014 predecessor. Exact enforcement scope should be verified against the 2025 text and current NEA project-approval requirements.

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INFORMATIONAL ONLY — Chinese BESS products certified to GB/T 36276 alone are likely to face documentation gaps when seeking EU/Estonia project permits or financing, specifically the absence of IEC 62933-5-2 system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data, UL 9540A fire-spread data, and cold-climate thermal-management validation for Estonia's −30 °C conditions. Manufacturers targeting Estonia should commission supplementary testing to these standards and ensure documentation is in Estonian or English. This is not legal advice; verify current harmonisation status and applicable national requirements with a qualified EU certifier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考——仅依据GB/T 36276认证的中国储能产品，在申请爱沙尼亚/欧盟项目许可或融资时，很可能面临文件缺口，具体表现为缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系统级热失控扩散试验数据、UL 9540A火势蔓延数据，以及针对爱沙尼亚-30°C条件的低温热管理验证。面向爱沙尼亚市场的制造商应委托开展上述标准的补充测试，并确保文件为爱沙尼亚语或英语。本内容不构成法律意见，请向具备资质的欧盟认证机构核实当前协调标准状态及适用的各国要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考——僅依據GB/T 36276認證的中國儲能產品，在申請愛沙尼亞/歐盟項目許可或融資時，很可能面臨文件缺口，具體表現為缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據、UL 9540A火勢蔓延數據，以及針對愛沙尼亞-30°C條件的低溫熱管理驗證。面向愛沙尼亞市場的製造商應委託開展上述標準的補充測試，並確保文件為愛沙尼亞語或英語。本內容不構成法律意見，請向具備資質的歐盟認證機構核實當前協調標準狀態及適用的各國要求。
